case_title: ALYSSA B MORENO ET AL VS. NINA GURALNIK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-07-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ALYSSA B MORENO AND JESUS CUEVAS. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MORENO, ALYSSA B
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $189.00 FILED BY MORENO, ALYSSA B CUEVAS, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT GURALNIK, NINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
